title: IIM Amritsar Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for 02 Chief Administrative Officer, Accounts Officer Posts
description: The Indian Institute of Management Amritsar (IIM Amritsar) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 02 Chief Administrative Officer, Chief Finance & Accounts Officer Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Post-graduation, PGDM, and CA can apply for the IIM Amritsar Jobs 2026. The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have ment...
